RuleSet.Name: src/Schema/jpa/SchemaJpaTable.java
RuleSet.Descr: Java 25 JPA implementation of a $TableName$ entity.

GenFile.Name: fileSchemaJpaTableJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$jpa/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$.jpa

RuleSet.GenRule: @NamedQuery(name="$leadlower DbSchemaName$$TableName$.countSysSecurityPermsByLoginId", query="select count(*) from (" + "select sg0.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg0 join sg0.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb0 join mb0.pkey.requiredParentUser pu0 where sg0.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu0.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select sg1.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg1 join sg1.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig1 join ig1.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg1a join sg1a.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb1 join mb1.pkey.requiredParentUser pu1 where sg1.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu1.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select sg2.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg2 join sg2.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig2 join ig2.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg2a join sg2a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig2a join ig2a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg2b join sg2b.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb2 join mb2.pkey.requiredParentUser pu2 where sg2.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu2.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select sg3.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg3 join sg3.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3 join ig3.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3a join sg3a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3a join ig3a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3b join sg3b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3b join ig3b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3c join sg3c.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb3 join mb3.pkey.requiredParentUser pu3 where sg3.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu3.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select sg4.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg4 join sg4.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4 join ig4.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4a join sg4a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4a join ig4a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4b join sg4b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4b join ig4b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4c join sg4c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4c join ig4c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4d join sg4d.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb4 join mb4.pkey.requiredParentUser pu4 where sg4.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu4.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select sg5.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg5 join sg5.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5 join ig5.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5a join sg5a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5a join ig5a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5b join sg5b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5b join ig5b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5c join sg5c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5c join ig5c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5d join sg5d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5d join ig5d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5e join sg5e.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb5 join mb5.pkey.requiredParentUser pu5 where sg5.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu5.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select sg6.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg6 join sg6.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6 join ig6.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6a join sg6a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6a join ig6a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6b join sg6b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6b join ig6b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6c join sg6c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6c join ig6c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6d join sg6d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6d join ig6d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6e join sg6e.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6e join ig6e.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6f join sg6f.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb6 join mb6.pkey.requiredParentUser pu6 where sg6.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu6.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select sg7.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg7 join sg7.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7 join ig7.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7a join sg7a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7a join ig7a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7b join sg7b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7b join ig7b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7c join sg7c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7c join ig7c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7d join sg7d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7d join ig7d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7e join sg7e.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7e join ig7e.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7f join sg7f.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7f join ig7f.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7g join sg7g.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb7 join mb7.pkey.requiredParentUser pu7 where sg7.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu7.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId)") @NamedQuery(name="$leadlower DbSchemaName$$TableName$.countSysSecurityPermsByUserId", query="select count(*) from (" + "select sg0.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg0 join sg0.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb0 join mb0.pkey.requiredParentUser pu0 where sg0.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu0.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select sg1.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg1 join sg1.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig1 join ig1.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg1a join sg1a.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb1 join mb1.pkey.requiredParentUser pu1 where sg1.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu1.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select sg2.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg2 join sg2.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig2 join ig2.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg2a join sg2a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig2a join ig2a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg2b join sg2b.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb2 join mb2.pkey.requiredParentUser pu2 where sg2.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu2.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select sg3.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg3 join sg3.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3 join ig3.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3a join sg3a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3a join ig3a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3b join sg3b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3b join ig3b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3c join sg3c.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb3 join mb3.pkey.requiredParentUser pu3 where sg3.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu3.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select sg4.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg4 join sg4.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4 join ig4.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4a join sg4a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4a join ig4a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4b join sg4b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4b join ig4b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4c join sg4c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4c join ig4c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4d join sg4d.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb4 join mb4.pkey.requiredParentUser pu4 where sg4.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu4.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select sg5.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg5 join sg5.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5 join ig5.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5a join sg5a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5a join ig5a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5b join sg5b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5b join ig5b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5c join sg5c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5c join ig5c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5d join sg5d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5d join ig5d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5e join sg5e.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb5 join mb5.pkey.requiredParentUser pu5 where sg5.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu5.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select sg6.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg6 join sg6.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6 join ig6.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6a join sg6a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6a join ig6a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6b join sg6b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6b join ig6b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6c join sg6c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6c join ig6c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6d join sg6d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6d join ig6d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6e join sg6e.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6e join ig6e.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6f join sg6f.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb6 join mb6.pkey.requiredParentUser pu6 where sg6.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu6.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select sg7.requiredName as requiredName from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg7 join sg7.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7 join ig7.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7a join sg7a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7a join ig7a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7b join sg7b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7b join ig7b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7c join sg7c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7c join ig7c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7d join sg7d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7d join ig7d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7e join sg7e.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7e join ig7e.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7f join sg7f.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7f join ig7f.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7g join sg7g.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb7 join mb7.pkey.requiredParentUser pu7 where sg7.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu7.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId)") @NamedQuery(name="$leadlower DbSchemaName$$TableName$.countClusSecurityPermsByLoginId", query="select count(*) from (select cl as filtered from (" + "select cg0.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg0 join sg0.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg0 join cg0.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb0 join mb0.pkey.requiredParentUser pu0 where sg0.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu0.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select cg1.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg1 join sg1.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig1 join ig1.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg1a join sg1a.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg1 join cg1.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb1 join mb1.pkey.requiredParentUser pu1 where sg1.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu1.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select cg2.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg2 join sg2.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig2 join ig2.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg2a join sg2a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig2a join ig2a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg2b join sg2b.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg2 join cg2.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb2 join mb2.pkey.requiredParentUser pu2 where sg2.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu2.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select cg3.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg3 join sg3.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3 join ig3.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3a join sg3a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3a join ig3a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3b join sg3b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3b join ig3b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3c join sg3c.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg3 join cg3.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb3 join mb3.pkey.requiredParentUser pu3 where sg3.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu3.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select cg4.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg4 join sg4.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4 join ig4.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4a join sg4a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4a join ig4a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4b join sg4b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4b join ig4b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4c join sg4c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4c join ig4c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4d join sg4d.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg4 join cg4.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb4 join mb4.pkey.requiredParentUser pu4 where sg4.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu4.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select cg5.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg5 join sg5.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5 join ig5.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5a join sg5a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5a join ig5a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5b join sg5b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5b join ig5b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5c join sg5c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5c join ig5c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5d join sg5d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5d join ig5d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5e join sg5e.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg5 join cg5.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb5 join mb5.pkey.requiredParentUser pu5 where sg5.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu5.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select cg6.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg6 join sg6.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6 join ig6.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6a join sg6a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6a join ig6a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6b join sg6b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6b join ig6b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6c join sg6c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6c join ig6c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6d join sg6d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6d join ig6d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6e join sg6e.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6e join ig6e.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6f join sg6f.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg6 join cg6.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb6 join mb6.pkey.requiredParentUser pu6 where sg6.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu6.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select cg7.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg7 join sg7.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7 join ig7.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7a join sg7a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7a join ig7a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7b join sg7b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7b join ig7b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7c join sg7c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7c join ig7c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7d join sg7d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7d join ig7d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7e join sg7e.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7e join ig7e.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7f join sg7f.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7f join ig7f.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7g join sg7g.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg7 join cg7.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb7 join mb7.pkey.requiredParentUser pu7 where sg7.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu7.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId)" + " where cl.requiredId = :parmClusterId)") @NamedQuery(name="$leadlower DbSchemaName$$TableName$.countClusSecurityPermsByUserId", query="select count(*) from (select cl as filtered from (" + "select cg0.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg0 join sg0.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg0 join cg0.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb0 join mb0.pkey.requiredParentUser pu0 where sg0.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu0.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select cg1.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg1 join sg1.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig1 join ig1.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg1a join sg1a.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg1 join cg1.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb1 join mb1.pkey.requiredParentUser pu1 where sg1.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu1.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select cg2.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg2 join sg2.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig2 join ig2.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg2a join sg2a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig2a join ig2a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg2b join sg2b.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg2 join cg2.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb2 join mb2.pkey.requiredParentUser pu2 where sg2.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu2.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select cg3.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg3 join sg3.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3 join ig3.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3a join sg3a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3a join ig3a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3b join sg3b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3b join ig3b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3c join sg3c.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg3 join cg3.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb3 join mb3.pkey.requiredParentUser pu3 where sg3.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu3.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select cg4.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg4 join sg4.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4 join ig4.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4a join sg4a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4a join ig4a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4b join sg4b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4b join ig4b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4c join sg4c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4c join ig4c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4d join sg4d.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg4 join cg4.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb4 join mb4.pkey.requiredParentUser pu4 where sg4.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu4.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select cg5.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg5 join sg5.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5 join ig5.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5a join sg5a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5a join ig5a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5b join sg5b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5b join ig5b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5c join sg5c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5c join ig5c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5d join sg5d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5d join ig5d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5e join sg5e.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg5 join cg5.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb5 join mb5.pkey.requiredParentUser pu5 where sg5.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu5.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select cg6.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg6 join sg6.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6 join ig6.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6a join sg6a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6a join ig6a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6b join sg6b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6b join ig6b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6c join sg6c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6c join ig6c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6d join sg6d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6d join ig6d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6e join sg6e.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6e join ig6e.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6f join sg6f.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg6 join cg6.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb6 join mb6.pkey.requiredParentUser pu6 where sg6.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu6.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select cg7.requiredOwnerCluster as cl from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg7 join sg7.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7 join ig7.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7a join sg7a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7a join ig7a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7b join sg7b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7b join ig7b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7c join sg7c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7c join ig7c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7d join sg7d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7d join ig7d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7e join sg7e.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7e join ig7e.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7f join sg7f.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7f join ig7f.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7g join sg7g.optionalChildrenImplClusGrp cg7 join cg7.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb7 join mb7.pkey.requiredParentUser pu7 where sg7.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu7.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId)" + " where cl.requiredId = :parmClusterId)") @NamedQuery(name="$leadlower DbSchemaName$$TableName$.countTentSecurityPermsByLoginId", query="select count(*) from (select tn as filtered from (" + "select tg0.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg0 join sg0.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg0 join tg0.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb0 join mb0.pkey.requiredParentUser pu0 where sg0.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu0.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select tg1.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg1 join sg1.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig1 join ig1.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg1a join sg1a.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg1 join tg1.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb1 join mb1.pkey.requiredParentUser pu1 where sg1.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu1.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select tg2.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg2 join sg2.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig2 join ig2.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg2a join sg2a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig2a join ig2a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg2b join sg2a.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg2 join tg2.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb2 join mb2.pkey.requiredParentUser pu2 where sg2.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu2.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select tg3.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg3 join sg3.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3 join ig3.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3a join sg3a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3a join ig3a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3b join sg3b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3b join ig3b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3c join sg3c.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg3 join tg3.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb3 join mb3.pkey.requiredParentUser pu3 where sg3.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu3.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select tg4.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg4 join sg4.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4 join ig4.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4a join sg4a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4a join ig4a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4b join sg4b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4b join ig4b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4c join sg4c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4c join ig4c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4d join sg4d.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg4 join tg4.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb4 join mb4.pkey.requiredParentUser pu4 where sg4.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu4.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select tg5.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg5 join sg5.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5 join ig5.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5a join sg5a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5a join ig5a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5b join sg5b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5b join ig5b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5c join sg5c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5c join ig5c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5d join sg5d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5d join ig5d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5e join sg5e.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg5 join tg5.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb5 join mb5.pkey.requiredParentUser pu5 where sg5.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu5.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select tg6.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg6 join sg6.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6 join ig6.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6a join sg6a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6a join ig6a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6b join sg6b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6b join ig6b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6c join sg6c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6c join ig6c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6d join sg6d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6d join ig6d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6e join sg6e.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6e join ig6e.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6f join sg6f.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg6 join tg6.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb6 join mb6.pkey.requiredParentUser pu6 where sg6.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu6.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId" + " union select tg7.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg7 join sg7.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7 join ig7.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7a join sg7a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7a join ig7a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7b join sg7b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7b join ig7b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7c join sg7c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7c join ig7c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7d join sg7d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7d join ig7d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7e join sg7e.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7e join ig7e.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7f join sg7f.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7f join ig7f.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7g join sg7g.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg7 join tg7.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb7 join mb7.pkey.requiredParentUser pu7 where sg7.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu7.requiredLoginId = :parmLoginId)" + " where tn.requiredId = :parmTenantId)") @NamedQuery(name="$leadlower DbSchemaName$$TableName$.countTentSecurityPermsByUserId", query="select count(*) from (select tn as filtered from (" + "select tg0.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg0 join sg0.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg0 join tg0.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb0 join mb0.pkey.requiredParentUser pu0 where sg0.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu0.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select tg1.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg1 join sg1.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig1 join ig1.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg1a join sg1a.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg1 join tg1.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb1 join mb1.pkey.requiredParentUser pu1 where sg1.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu1.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select tg2.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg2 join sg2.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig2 join ig2.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg2a join sg2a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig2a join ig2a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg2b join sg2a.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg2 join tg2.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb2 join mb2.pkey.requiredParentUser pu2 where sg2.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu2.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select tg3.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg3 join sg3.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3 join ig3.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3a join sg3a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3a join ig3a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3b join sg3b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig3b join ig3b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg3c join sg3c.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg3 join tg3.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb3 join mb3.pkey.requiredParentUser pu3 where sg3.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu3.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select tg4.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg4 join sg4.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4 join ig4.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4a join sg4a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4a join ig4a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4b join sg4b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4b join ig4b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4c join sg4c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig4c join ig4c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg4d join sg4d.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg4 join tg4.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb4 join mb4.pkey.requiredParentUser pu4 where sg4.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu4.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select tg5.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg5 join sg5.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5 join ig5.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5a join sg5a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5a join ig5a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5b join sg5b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5b join ig5b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5c join sg5c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5c join ig5c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5d join sg5d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig5d join ig5d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg5e join sg5e.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg5 join tg5.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb5 join mb5.pkey.requiredParentUser pu5 where sg5.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu5.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select tg6.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg6 join sg6.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6 join ig6.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6a join sg6a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6a join ig6a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6b join sg6b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6b join ig6b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6c join sg6c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6c join ig6c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6d join sg6d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6d join ig6d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6e join sg6e.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig6e join ig6e.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg6f join sg6f.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg6 join tg6.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb6 join mb6.pkey.requiredParentUser pu6 where sg6.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu6.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId" + " union select tg7.requiredOwnerTenant as tn from $SecSchemaName$JpaSecSysGrp sg7 join sg7.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7 join ig7.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7a join sg7a.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7a join ig7a.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7b join sg7b.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7b join ig7b.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7c join sg7c.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7c join ig7c.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7d join sg7d.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7d join ig7d.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7e join sg7e.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7e join ig7e.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7f join sg7f.optionalChildrenIncByGrp ig7f join ig7f.pkey.requiredParentSubGroup sg7g join sg7g.optionalChildrenImplTentGrp tg7 join tg7.optionalChildrenMembByGrp mb7 join mb7.pkey.requiredParentUser pu7 where sg7.requiredName = :parmPermName and pu7.requiredSecUserId = :parmUserId)" + " where tn.requiredId = :parmTenantId)")
$iterate SuperiorCandidatePrimaryKeyRelations(each declSchemaJpaRelationMember empty empty)$$iterate SubservientCandidatePrimaryKeyRelations(each declSchemaJpaRelationMember empty empty)$
$iterate SuperiorPrimaryKeyRelations(each implSchemaJpaTableEmbedPKeyRelationGetterSetter empty empty)$$iterate SubservientPrimaryKeyRelations(each implSchemaJpaTablePKeyRelationGetter empty empty)$

$iterate SuperiorPrimaryKeyRelations(each implSchemaJpaTableWrapPKeyRelationGetterSetter empty empty)$$iterate SubservientPrimaryKeyRelations(each implSchemaJpaTableWrapPKeyRelationGetter empty empty)$
$reference FromTable reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex IsAtomic$

$lower reference FromCol reference Column implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference FromCol reference Column Name$ = $popto Relation leadlower OptionalOrRequired$$popto Relation RelationType$$popto Relation Suffix$.get$reference FromCol implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference FromCol Name$();

$lower reference FromCol reference Column implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference FromCol reference Column Name$ = I$reference FromCol reference Column reference Table DefSchemaName$$reference FromCol reference Column reference Table TableName$.$upper reference FromCol reference Column Name$_INIT_VALUE;
$lower reference FromCol reference Column implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference FromCol reference Column Name$ = null;

$reference FromTable reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns(lone emitAtomicPKeyAttrName empty empty each empty)$ = $leadlower OptionalOrRequired$$RelationType$$Suffix$.$iterate Columns( lone emitColumnGetterMethod each empty empty empty )$;
$switch HasSuperClassRelation no implJpaOptAuditColumnAttr default empty$$iterate Columns( each maybeDeclSchemaJpaTableJPADataColumn )$

set$OptionalOrRequired$$RelationType$$Suffix$($leadlower poptop Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( lone implColumnAttrOptionality first empty each empty empty empty )$$poptop Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( lone Name first empty each empty empty empty )$);
$switch IsNullable yes implOptGetter default implReqGetter$$switch InSuperiorRelation yes empty default implMaybeColumnSetter$

return( I$reference SuperiorRelationCol reference ToCol DefSchemaName$$reference SuperiorRelationCol reference ToCol TableName$.$upper reference SuperiorRelationCol reference ToCol Name$_INIT_VALUE );

this.$lower reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( lone implColumnAttrOptionality first empty each empty empty empty )$$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( lone Name first empty each emptyl empty empty )$ = $leadlower reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( lone implColumnAttrOptionality first empty each empty empty empty )$$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( lone Name first empty each empty empty empty )$;
@Index(name = "$IndexName$", columnList = "$jpaTableIndexColumnList$", unique = $switch IsUnique yes true default false$)
$iterate Columns( each CommaDbColumnName first DbColumnName empty empty )$
public final static int CLASS_CODE = 0x$ClassCode$; public final static String S_CLASS_CODE = "$ClassCode$";
$switch IsPrimaryIndexKeyAtomic yes implJpaConstructorInitPKeyAttr default implJpaConstructorInitPKey$$iterate Columns( each implConstructorMaybeInitAttr empty empty )$
$leadlower reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( lone implConstructorInitValue each empty empty empty )$
I$SchemaName$$TableName$HPKey rhs = (I$SchemaName$$TableName$HPKey)obj;$reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implEqualsCmpAttr )$ return( true );
I$SchemaName$$TableName$PKey rhs = (I$SchemaName$$TableName$PKey)obj;$reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implEqualsCmpAttr )$
$reference BaseClass switch HasAuditColumns yes implJpaEqualsAuditColumns default empty$
throw new CFLibUnsupportedClassException( getClass(), "compareTo", "obj", obj, null );
I$SchemaName$$TableName$H rhs = (I$SchemaName$$TableName$H)obj;$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implCompareToAttr )$
$reference BaseClass switch HasAuditColumns yes implJpaCompareAuditColumns default empty$
throw new CFLibUnsupportedClassException( getClass(), "compareTo", "obj", obj, null );
int cmp = super.compareTo( obj ); return( cmp );
$reference BaseClass iterate Relation(each maybeSetCopySchemaTablePKeyRelation empty empty)$$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each maybeSetCopyPKeyAttr )$
$reference BaseClass iterate Relation(each maybeSetHCopySchemaTablePKeyRelation empty empty)$$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each maybeSetCopyPKeyAttr )$
set$reference Column implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference Column Name$(src.get$reference Column implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference Column Name$());
super.set$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable TableName$( src );
""$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first implToStringEmitXmlAttr each empty empty empty )$
